name: Percentage Calculator
description: Industrial-grade percentage calculator for process yield, defect rate, and efficiency analysis, compliant with ISO 9001, Lean, and Six Sigma standards.

inputs.label: Total Units Produced
inputs.businessContext: Total number of units produced in the reporting period (ISO 9001:2015 clause 9.1.3).

businessContext_i18n.en: Total number of units produced in the reporting period (ISO 9001:2015 clause 9.1.3).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Raporlama döneminde üretilen toplam birim sayısı (ISO 9001:2015 madde 9.1.3).
businessContext_i18n.de: Gesamtzahl der im Berichtszeitraum produzierten Einheiten (ISO 9001:2015, Klausel 9.1.3).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre total d'unités produites au cours de la période de reporting (ISO 9001:2015 clause 9.1.3).
businessContext_i18n.es: Número total de unidades producidas en el período de reporte (ISO 9001:2015 cláusula 9.1.3).

inputs.label: Defective Units
inputs.businessContext: Number of units failing quality inspection (Six Sigma DPMO metric).

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of units failing quality inspection (Six Sigma DPMO metric).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Kalite denetiminden geçemeyen birim sayısı (Altı Sigma DPMO metriği).
businessContext_i18n.de: Anzahl der Einheiten, die die Qualitätsprüfung nicht bestehen (Six Sigma DPMO-Kennzahl).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Nombre d'unités ne répondant pas à l'inspection qualité (métrique Six Sigma DPMO).
businessContext_i18n.es: Número de unidades que fallan la inspección de calidad (métrica DPMO de Seis Sigma).

inputs.label: Rework Units
inputs.businessContext: Units that required rework to meet specifications (Lean waste reduction).

businessContext_i18n.en: Units that required rework to meet specifications (Lean waste reduction).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Spesifikasyonları karşılamak için yeniden işlem gerektiren birimler (Yalın israf azaltma).
businessContext_i18n.de: Einheiten, die nachbearbeitet werden mussten, um die Spezifikationen zu erfüllen (Lean-Abfallreduzierung).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Unités nécessitant une reprise pour répondre aux spécifications (réduction des gaspillages Lean).
businessContext_i18n.es: Unidades que requirieron retrabajo para cumplir especificaciones (reducción de desperdicio Lean).

inputs.label: Scrap Units
inputs.businessContext: Units that are scrapped and cannot be reworked (material yield loss).

businessContext_i18n.en: Units that are scrapped and cannot be reworked (material yield loss).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Hurdaya ayrılan ve yeniden işlenemeyen birimler (malzeme verim kaybı).
businessContext_i18n.de: Einheiten, die verschrottet werden und nicht nachbearbeitet werden können (Materialausbeuteverlust).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Unités mises au rebut et ne pouvant être retravaillées (perte de rendement matière).
businessContext_i18n.es: Unidades que se desechan y no pueden retrabajarse (pérdida de rendimiento de material).

inputs.label: Target Yield (%)
inputs.businessContext: Desired first-pass yield percentage (Six Sigma target ≥ 99.99966% for 6σ).

businessContext_i18n.en: Desired first-pass yield percentage (Six Sigma target ≥ 99.99966% for 6σ).
businessContext_i18n.tr: İstenen ilk geçiş verim yüzdesi (Altı Sigma hedefi ≥ %99,99966).
businessContext_i18n.de: Gewünschte Erstpass-Ausbeute in Prozent (Six Sigma-Ziel ≥ 99,99966 % für 6σ).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Pourcentage de rendement au premier passage souhaité (cible Six Sigma ≥ 99,99966 % pour 6σ).
businessContext_i18n.es: Porcentaje de rendimiento de primera pasada deseado (objetivo Seis Sigma ≥ 99.99966% para 6σ).

inputs.label: Process Type
inputs.businessContext: Type of process for contextual benchmarking (WERC DC metrics, ISO 9001).

businessContext_i18n.en: Type of process for contextual benchmarking (WERC DC metrics, ISO 9001).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Bağlamsal kıyaslama için proses türü (WERC DC metrikleri, ISO 9001).
businessContext_i18n.de: Prozesstyp für kontextuelles Benchmarking (WERC DC-Kennzahlen, ISO 9001).
businessContext_i18n.fr: Type de processus pour un benchmarking contextuel (métriques WERC DC, ISO 9001).
businessContext_i18n.es: Tipo de proceso para evaluación comparativa contextual (métricas WERC DC, ISO 9001).

inputs.label: Include Scrap in Defect Count
inputs.businessContext: If true, scrap units are counted as defective for defect rate calculation.

label_i18n.fr: Inclure le rebut dans le décompte des défauts
label_i18n.es: Incluir desperdicio en el conteo de defectos

businessContext_i18n.en: If true, scrap units are counted as defective for defect rate calculation.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Doğruysa, kusur oranı hesaplamasında fire birimler kusurlu sayılır.
businessContext_i18n.de: Wenn wahr, werden Ausschussteile als fehlerhaft für die Fehlerratenberechnung gezählt.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Si vrai, les unités de rebut sont comptées comme défectueuses pour le calcul du taux de défauts.
businessContext_i18n.es: Si es verdadero, las unidades de desperdicio se cuentan como defectuosas para el cálculo de la tasa de defectos.

rules.message: Defective units cannot exceed total units.
Rework units cannot exceed total units.
Scrap units cannot exceed total units.
Sum of defective and rework units cannot exceed total units.
Target yield must be between 0 and 100.

thresholds.message: First-pass yield is below 95% – investigate process stability.
First-pass yield below 80% – immediate corrective action required (ISO 9001:2015 clause 10.2).
Scrap rate exceeds 5% – review material and process parameters.
Rework rate above 10% – consider root cause analysis (Lean).

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
